'''âz-l-sh''' ('''zalasha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:heed|heed]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-l-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:heed|heed]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-l-sh
|-
! Lemma
| zalasha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zalashithi|zalashithi]] || [[word:zalashiji|zalashiji]] || [[word:zalashishi|zalashishi]] || [[word:zalashi|zalashi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zalashuthuth|zalashuthuth]] || [[word:zalashujuj|zalashujuj]] || [[word:zalashushush|zalashushush]] || [[word:zalash|zalash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zalashuthu|zalashuthu]] || [[word:zalashuju|zalashuju]] || [[word:zalashushu|zalashushu]] || [[word:zalashu|zalashu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zalashufuth|zalashufuth]] || [[word:zalashufuj|zalashufuj]] || [[word:zalashufush|zalashufush]] || [[word:zalashuf|zalashuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zalashethe|zalashethe]] || [[word:zalasheje|zalasheje]] || [[word:zalasheshe|zalasheshe]] || [[word:zalashe|zalashe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zalashothoth|zalashothoth]] || [[word:zalashojoj|zalashojoj]] || [[word:zalashoshosh|zalashoshosh]] || [[word:zalash|zalash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zalashotho|zalashotho]] || [[word:zalashojo|zalashojo]] || [[word:zalashosho|zalashosho]] || [[word:zalasho|zalasho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zalashofoth|zalashofoth]] || [[word:zalashofoj|zalashofoj]] || [[word:zalashofosh|zalashofosh]] || [[word:zalashof|zalashof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zalashĂŠthĂŠ|zalashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zalashĂŠjĂŠ|zalashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zalashĂŠshĂŠ|zalashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zalashĂŠ|zalashĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zalashathath|zalashathath]] || [[word:zalashajaj|zalashajaj]] || [[word:zalashashash|zalashashash]] || [[word:zalash|zalash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zalashatha|zalashatha]] || [[word:zalashaja|zalashaja]] || [[word:zalashasha|zalashasha]] || [[word:zalasha|zalasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zalashafath|zalashafath]] || [[word:zalashafaj|zalashafaj]] || [[word:zalashafash|zalashafash]] || [[word:zalashaf|zalashaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zalashasha|zalashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozalashasha|gozalashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizalashasha|gokizalashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zalashnĂŒsha|zalashnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozalashnknĂŒsha|gozalashnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizalashnĂŒsha|gokizalashnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zalashĂ«sha|zalashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozalashnkshĂ«sha|gozalashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizalashĂ«sha|gokizalashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zalashrosha|zalashrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozalashnkrosha|gozalashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizalashrosha|gokizalashrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zalashmusha|zalashmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozalashnkmusha|gozalashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizalashmusha|gokizalashmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zalasherasha|zalasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozalashnksherasha|gozalashnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizalasherasha|gokizalasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zalashngasha|zalashngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozalashnkngasha|gozalashnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizalashngasha|gokizalashngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zalashyasha|zalashyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozalashnkyasha|gozalashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizalashyasha|gokizalashyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zalashyamasha|zalashyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozalashnkyamasha|gozalashnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizalashyamasha|gokizalashyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zalashnĂŒshĂ«sha|zalashnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozalashnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gozalashnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizalashnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokizalashnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zalashnĂŒrosha|zalashnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozalashnknĂŒrosha|gozalashnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizalashnĂŒrosha|gokizalashnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zalashnĂŒmusha|zalashnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozalashnknĂŒmusha|gozalashnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizalashnĂŒmusha|gokizalashnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zalashĂ«nĂŒsha|zalashĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozalashnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gozalashnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizalashĂ«nĂŒsha|gokizalashĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zalashĂ«rosha|zalashĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozalashnkshĂ«rosha|gozalashnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizalashĂ«rosha|gokizalashĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zalashĂ«musha|zalashĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozalashnkshĂ«musha|gozalashnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizalashĂ«musha|gokizalashĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zalashronĂŒsha|zalashronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozalashnkronĂŒsha|gozalashnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizalashronĂŒsha|gokizalashronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zalashroshĂ«sha|zalashroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozalashnkroshĂ«sha|gozalashnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizalashroshĂ«sha|gokizalashroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zalashromusha|zalashromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozalashnkromusha|gozalashnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizalashromusha|gokizalashromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zalashmunĂŒsha|zalashmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozalashnkmunĂŒsha|gozalashnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizalashmunĂŒsha|gokizalashmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zalashmushĂ«sha|zalashmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozalashnkmushĂ«sha|gozalashnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizalashmushĂ«sha|gokizalashmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zalashmurosha|zalashmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozalashnkmurosha|gozalashnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizalashmurosha|gokizalashmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zalash|zalash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:zĂŠlĂŠsh|zĂŠlĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozalash|hozalash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hozĂŠlĂŠsh|hozĂŠlĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozalash|hohozalash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozĂŠlĂŠsh|hohozĂŠlĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒzalash|nĂŒzalash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒzĂŠlĂŠsh|nĂŒzĂŠlĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒzalash|nĂŒnĂŒzalash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒzĂŠlĂŠsh|nĂŒnĂŒzĂŠlĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻzalash|nĂŻzalash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻzĂŠlĂŠsh|nĂŻzĂŠlĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻzalash|nĂŻnĂŻzalash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻzĂŠlĂŠsh|nĂŻnĂŻzĂŠlĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzalash|luzalash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luzĂŠlĂŠsh|luzĂŠlĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzalash|luluzalash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzĂŠlĂŠsh|luluzĂŠlĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizalash|lizalash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lizĂŠlĂŠsh|lizĂŠlĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizalash|lilizalash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizĂŠlĂŠsh|lilizĂŠlĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozalash|kozalash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kozĂŠlĂŠsh|kozĂŠlĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozalash|kokozalash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozĂŠlĂŠsh|kokozĂŠlĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezalash|kezalash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kezĂŠlĂŠsh|kezĂŠlĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezalash|kekezalash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezĂŠlĂŠsh|kekezĂŠlĂŠsh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
